meaning: adj.有扶手的,武装的,(动物)有防卫器官的
examples: All the armed groups will be disbanded.
Armed guards wrestled with the intruder.
Armed troops searched the hospital yesterday.
Twenty Russian wardens already patrol the rivers, some armed with Kalashnikovs to discourage poachers.
Frighteningly, both are armed with the latest technologies and the winner is far from predictable.
